mapper.select: SELECT icategory categoryId, name boardName FROM board_category WHERE icategory = #{categoryId}

SELECT a.iboard boardId, a.title, c.unm nm, a.created_at createdAt FROM board a INNER JOIN board_category b ON a.icategory = b.icategory INNER JOIN user c ON a.iuser = c.iuser WHERE b.icategory = #{categoryId} ORDER BY a.iboard DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{amount}

SELECT b.name boardCategoryName, a.title, a.contents, c.unm writer, a.created_at createdAt, a.updated_at updatedAt FROM board a INNER JOIN board_category b ON a.icategory = b.icategory INNER JOIN user c ON a.iuser = c.iuser WHERE a.iboard = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board SET icategory = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, contents = #{contents}, iuser = #{userId}
